_meta: 재등장 장소만 시트화. build.py는 씬 location의 sheet 파일이 존재하면 ref로 첨부(cast ref 다음, 최대 max_refs), 없으면 desc 텍스트만 사용. 1회성 배경(관아 마당·염전·한양)은 넣지 않고 씬 텍스트로 처리.

hanok.desc: a poor small thatched-roof hanok (chogajip) with a low earthen wall and a bare dirt courtyard, humble Joseon mountain-village home, warm modest interior with a low room and small kitchen

market.desc: a rustic Joseon village marketplace (jangteo), straw-roofed stalls, sacks of salt and grain, earthen jars, common folk in hanbok bustling

cave.desc: a cool dim mountain cave interior with rows of large earthen jars (onggi) storing salt, shadowy damp stone walls, faint light from the entrance

mountain_path.desc: a steep rugged forest mountain path in old Korea, tall pine trees and mossy rocks, a narrow winding dirt trail, misty depth
